rationale: The citing paper’s core model is a forward-looking dynamic discrete-choice framework that jointly estimates short-term promotion effects and retention under loyalty thresholds, and the cited paper is a dynamic structural forward-looking promotion model that demonstrates bias in reduced-form logit promotion estimates. Given this strong methodological and construct overlap (forward-looking behavior, promotion response, structural dynamic modeling), the citation is plausibly foundational/method-relevant rather than an obvious incidental mention.
